title: Action-scoped provider only detects an uncovered action
description: Item 8: the same network-only sandbox (real enforcement scoped to network_connect/network_fetch/dns_lookup) is asked about a file_write. It cannot contain a file write — it has no real enforcement for this action type — so it must NOT claim enforces. It still observes inside the jail: detects, not blind. This is the soundness payoff of action-scoped capability: a partial enforcer cannot over-claim. Verdict stays allow (clean file_write under the developer-workflow floor).
